title: HE Definition & Meaning - Merriam-Webster
snippet: The meaning of HE is that male one who is neither speaker nor hearer. How to use he in a sentence.

title: HE definition in American English | Collins English Dictionary
snippet: In written English, he is sometimes used to refer to a person without saying whether that person is a man or a woman. Many people prefer to use `he or she' or `they' as an alternative to `he.'

title: HE Definition & Meaning | Dictionary.com
snippet: HE definition: the male person or animal being discussed or last mentioned; that male. See examples of he used in a sentence.

title: He (pronoun) - Wikipedia
snippet: Today, he is the only masculine pronoun in English. In the 18th century, it was suggested as a gender-neutral pronoun, and was thereafter often prescribed in manuals of style and school textbooks until the …

title: He - definition of he by The Free Dictionary
snippet: usage: Traditionally, the pronouns he, his, and him have been used generically to refer to indefinite singular pronouns like anyone, everyone, and someone (Everyone who agrees should raise his hand) …

title: He - Definition, Meaning & Synonyms | Vocabulary.com
snippet: pronoun used to refer to people in general, without reference to gender, as in "He who hesitates is lost;" now considered nonstandard pronoun used to refer to something treated as male in literature, as in …

title: He Definition & Meaning | Britannica Dictionary
snippet: 2 he / ˈ hiː/ noun Britannica Dictionary definition of HE [singular] : a boy, man, or male animal

title: He Definition & Meaning | YourDictionary
snippet: He definition: Used to refer to the male person or animal previously mentioned or implied.

title: he - WordReference.com Dictionary of English
snippet: The use of he and other masculine pronouns to refer to an unspecified person or to people in general, as in everybody can do as he likes in this country, was formerly widespread.
